scripts.build: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && api-extractor run --local --verbose && find dist -maxdepth 2 -not -path 'dist/.rollup/*' \( -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' \) -delete && cp dist/.rollup/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const p='dist/index.d.ts';const ref='/// <reference lib=\"esnext.disposable\" />\n';const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!s.startsWith(ref))fs.writeFileSync(p,ref+s);" && rm -rf dist/.rollup
